data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Encrypts user data in transit to protect against eavesdropping.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects the site from common web threats and exploits.
data.technical_spec: AWS WAF offers SQL injection and cross-site scripting (XSS) protection.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates Distributed Denial of Service attacks to maintain uptime.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security assessments to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated and manual penetration testing procedures.

data.title: Data Privacy and Compliance
data.description: Compliance with international data protection standards like GDPR.
data.technical_spec: Data encryption, anonymization, and user consent processes in place.
